hero.title: Acceptance
hero.subtitle: Independent assurance on readiness and handover quality.

overview.title: What this covers
overview.text: Structured acceptance checks against defined criteria, documentation completeness and control operation to reduce go‑live and audit risks.

items.title: Clear criteria
items.text: Acceptance standards aligned to risk and regulatory context.

items.title: Evidence trail
items.text: Defensible documentation for auditors and stakeholders.

items.title: Reduced rework
items.text: Fewer late changes and cleaner handovers.

items.title: Scope & criteria
items.text: Define what ‘done’ means and evidence requirements.

items.title: Review & testing
items.text: Verify completeness and operation of key controls.

items.title: Sign‑off
items.text: Summarize findings and confirm acceptance or actions.
